elements.text:
• Ignore the scatterplot; focus on the 'Coefficients' table.

• Identify the row corresponding to your specific input variable.

• The value in the Coefficient column is your slope.

elements.prompt: A clean, professional Excel regression output table showing columns for Coefficients, Standard Error, t Stat, and P-value. The 'Coefficients' column is highlighted with a subtle, semi-transparent yellow overlay instead of an opaque red block.
